title: To One Who Teaches Me
content:
"To one who teaches me
    The sweetness and the beauty
    Of doing faithfully
    And cheerfully my duty."
meaning:
Louisa May Alcott's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To One Who Teaches Me"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
